overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a dystopian urban street market and homeless encampment beneath an overpass. The scene features burning barrels, neon signs, abandoned vehicles, and scattered NPCs amidst a hazy, atmospheric environment with mixed fire and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market entrance with parked vehicles

events.description: entering the metal canopy structure containing furniture and supplies

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the street market area approaching a canopy shelter

notable_agents.action: two people standing and conversing near a covered vehicle

entered.detail: vehicle covered with gray tarp parked on the left side
metal frame canopy with dark fabric roof covering furniture
worn green upholstered sofa under the canopy shelter
bright red plastic chair next to metal shelving unit

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit underpass area with two NPCs standing near a tarp-covered vehicle. The camera walks forward entering a makeshift canopy shelter containing a green sofa, red chair, and shelving units, with the glow of distant fire visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with burning barrel fires

events.description: moving into area dominated by warm fire light from burning barrels
passing NPCs standing against the chain-link fence on the right

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow passage between burning barrels and building walls

notable_agents.action: person standing against wall near bright light source
second person standing near the first, partially obscured by shadow

entered.detail: metal barrel with open flames burning inside, casting orange light
metal chain-link fence along the concrete wall
elevated concrete walkway with metal railings leading upward
intense fire burning in a metal container with rising smoke

segments.scene_description: Exiting the canopy, the camera moves through a narrow alleyway illuminated by burning barrels. The walls are lined with chain-link fencing where NPCs stand watching. A large fire burns intensely on the right as the camera approaches a concrete ramp structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: food cart area with abandoned vehicles and market stalls

events.description: entering the food cart area with neon signage and abandoned vehicles
navigating around abandoned cars blocking the path through the encampment

agents.ego_description: walking past a food cart and through an area with abandoned vehicles and sitting NPCs

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground near the food cart
figure standing near the abandoned cars in the distance

entered.detail: blue food cart with yellow umbrella and glowing neon lighting
tall vertical digital advertisements with colorful graphics on buildings
derelict vehicle with headlights on, surrounded by debris and trash
single red plastic chair placed near the abandoned car

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wider street area featuring a blue food cart with neon lighting on the left. The camera passes abandoned vehicles with headlights still glowing, navigating through debris. NPCs sit near the cart while distant neon billboards illuminate the hazy air above the market stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open underpass area approaching a bright light source

events.description: approaching the bright white floodlight at the end of the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the open area toward a bright light source in the distance

entered.detail: intense white light source illuminating the end of the underpass tunnel
large concrete support columns for the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide, empty area beneath the overpass with wet asphalt reflecting the ambient light. The camera walks steadily toward an intense white floodlight in the distance, passing massive concrete support pillars as the market area falls behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cramped, makeshift shelter into a vast, industrial void beneath a city overpass. It begins in a dimly lit underpass, moving past figures by a tarp-covered vehicle and through a canopy shelter filled with mismatched furniture toward a distant glow. As the camera exits the shelter, the environment narrows into a gritty alleyway where the light shifts to the orange flicker of burning barrels and the gaze of NPCs behind chain-link fences. The scene then expands into a wider street market, passing a neon-lit blue food cart and glowing headlights of abandoned vehicles amidst a hazy, billboard-lit atmosphere. Finally, the camera leaves the market behind, gliding across wet asphalt and past massive concrete pillars toward a piercing white floodlight in the distance.
